subject: Need market value assessment for flat in Andheri
body: We are processing a top-up loan and require an independent assessment of the current market price of the client's 2BHK before we sanction. Please arrange.
label: VALUATION_REQUEST

subject: Worth of the mortgaged bungalow
body: Kindly let us know how much the bungalow at plot 14 fetches in today's market before we approve the enhancement.
label: VALUATION_REQUEST

subject: how much is the shop
body: sir what price will the commercial shop in karol bagh get now? need for loan file
label: VALUATION_REQUEST

subject: Appraisal pending for Mehta file
body: The surveyor still hasn't given us a figure for the Mehta property. Can we get the assessed amount this week?
label: VALUATION_REQUEST

subject: Current price of agricultural land
body: Please depute someone to estimate what the 3 acres near Hosur would sell for. Required for the agri loan.
label: VALUATION_REQUEST

subject: Advocate's view needed on disputed plot
body: There is a pending family dispute on the ancestral land offered as security. Can your panel lawyer give a written opinion on whether we can proceed?
label: LEGAL_OPINION

subject: Is the property legally safe to fund?
body: Before disbursing we want counsel to confirm there are no encumbrances or court attachments on the asset.
label: LEGAL_OPINION

subject: Need lawyer sign-off
body: Please have the empanelled advocate examine the chain documents and certify whether the mortgage is enforceable.
label: LEGAL_OPINION

subject: Opinion on gift deed validity
body: The property came to the borrower via a gift deed. We'd like a legal view on whether that creates any risk for us.
label: LEGAL_OPINION

subject: court matter on collateral
body: there seems to be some litigation going on this flat. kindly ask legal to advise if we can still take it as security
label: LEGAL_OPINION

subject: Verify ownership chain for the last 30 years
body: Please trace the ownership history of survey no. 221 and confirm the chain is unbroken before we proceed.
label: TITLE_SEARCH

subject: Check who actually owns this land
body: We need confirmation that the seller named in the agreement is the rightful registered owner.
label: TITLE_SEARCH

subject: EC for the last 13 years please
body: Kindly obtain the encumbrance certificate and verify there are no prior registered charges on the property.
label: TITLE_SEARCH

subject: deed verification
body: can you pull the registered sale deeds and confirm the title flows cleanly to the current applicant
label: TITLE_SEARCH

subject: Is the flat free of prior mortgage?
body: Please confirm from the sub-registrar records that this apartment is not already pledged to another lender.
label: TITLE_SEARCH

subject: Time to renew the fire cover on the godown
body: The existing fire policy on the hypothecated stock lapses next month. Please initiate continuation.
label: INSURANCE_RENEWAL

subject: Policy expiring - need fresh quote
body: Customer's property cover is about to end; share the new premium so we can keep the asset protected.
label: INSURANCE_RENEWAL

subject: asset protection lapsing
body: the cover on the financed car ends on the 30th. pls arrange continuation so the hypothecation stays insured
label: INSURANCE_RENEWAL

subject: Premium due reminder
body: Mr Khanna's home insurance premium is overdue. Kindly process the renewal before the grace period ends.
label: INSURANCE_RENEWAL

subject: Continue the cover for another year
body: We'd like to extend the existing policy on the mortgaged building. Please send the renewal notice.
label: INSURANCE_RENEWAL

subject: Loan fully repaid - return the papers
body: Mr. Rao has cleared his entire outstanding. Kindly issue the no-dues and hand back the original deeds.
label: RELEASE_OF_COLLATERAL

subject: Lift the charge on my house
body: I closed my mortgage last week. Please remove the bank's lien so I can sell the property.
label: RELEASE_OF_COLLATERAL

subject: NOC request after closure
body: Account LN44213 is settled in full. Requesting the no-objection letter and release of the property documents.
label: RELEASE_OF_COLLATERAL

subject: give back my documents
body: loan over and done since march, still haven't got my original papers back. please release them
label: RELEASE_OF_COLLATERAL

subject: Remove hypothecation from RC
body: The vehicle loan is closed. Please issue Form 35 and the NOC so I can get the hypothecation removed from the RC.
label: RELEASE_OF_COLLATERAL

subject: Please send someone to see the construction
body: We'd like a field officer to physically check the progress of the building before the next tranche.
label: SITE_VISIT

subject: Inspection of the factory premises
body: Arrange a visit to verify the machinery actually exists at the stated address.
label: SITE_VISIT

subject: go and check the property
body: sir kindly depute field staff to the bandra address to confirm the flat is occupied by the borrower
label: SITE_VISIT

subject: Physical verification before disbursal
body: Please arrange for someone to visit and photograph the under-construction site this week.
label: SITE_VISIT

subject: Stage check needed at plot
body: The builder claims slab work is done. Can we send an engineer to confirm on the ground?
label: SITE_VISIT

subject: Still waiting for the salary slips
body: The borrower hasn't submitted last 3 months payslips and bank statements. Please chase them.
label: DOCUMENT_COLLECTION

subject: Missing KYC papers
body: We cannot proceed until the customer uploads their PAN and address proof.
label: DOCUMENT_COLLECTION

subject: papers pending from customer
body: property tax receipts and the latest ITR are still not received. follow up with applicant please
label: DOCUMENT_COLLECTION

subject: Need the registered agreement copy
body: Kindly collect the stamped sale agreement from Mr. Joseph before we send the file for sanction.
label: DOCUMENT_COLLECTION

subject: Incomplete file - get remaining docs
body: Three items are outstanding: bank statement, Form 16, and the occupancy certificate. Please obtain them.
label: DOCUMENT_COLLECTION

subject: What's happening with my application?
body: I applied three weeks ago and heard nothing. Can someone tell me where things stand?
label: GENERAL_INQUIRY

subject: General question about your process
body: How long does the whole thing usually take from start to finish? Just curious.
label: GENERAL_INQUIRY

subject: any update
body: hi, just checking if there is any movement on my case. been a while. thanks
label: GENERAL_INQUIRY

subject: Whom do I contact?
body: Could you let me know which branch officer is handling my loan and their number?
label: GENERAL_INQUIRY

subject: Confused about next steps
body: I got an SMS saying action required but it's not clear what I need to do. Please clarify.
label: GENERAL_INQUIRY
